flat-lab.evidenceRequired: support/fixture source plus stability gate; not unassisted success
flat-lab.warning: Assisted fixture evidence must not be presented as unassisted standing or real telemetry.

instrumented-lab.evidenceRequired: support/fixture source plus stability gate; not unassisted success
instrumented-lab.warning: Assisted fixture evidence must not be presented as unassisted standing or real telemetry.

rough-terrain.evidenceRequired: fall/contact/slip metrics under free MuJoCo stepping
rough-terrain.warning: Free contact mode needs stability evidence before being called successful.

g1/scene_g1_policy.xml.floor: plane floor with current MJCF groundplane material

g1/scene_g1_rough.xml.floor: plane floor friction=0.6 condim=3 plus curb boxes friction=0.8 condim=3
g1/scene_g1_rough.xml.contact: rough/curb contact-bearing MJCF variant; not loaded by Step 3 for unitree-g1-elastic-stand

limits: flat-lab and instrumented-lab are visual/contract presets over the current active MJCF scene.
rough-terrain records the rough/contact intent and marks scene reload as required for contact-bearing terrain evidence.
grounding controls in M28 Step 2/3 record claims and evidence requirements; they do not mutate MuJoCo solver/contact behavior.
assisted-fixture evidence must not be described as unassisted controller success or real robot telemetry.
